{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170822DCE199F99564BAD73EAC"}"},"total":5483},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7566276165349720856","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"［雀食神作］真正的女强无cp文(当然人钱99)，女主也不是财迷心窍那种，有勇有谋，有仇就报，看起来很冷漠其实比谁都重感情，还会用棒棒糖祭奠。每一个副本故事都很有吸引力，立意也深刻，看完有种震撼的感觉。就算是出场不算多的配角形象也立体丰满，主角更不用说。
“我想……所有的安娜，都能平安长大。”
“请让我来操作一次手术。”
“宁可痛苦，不要麻木。”
新封面很符合女主哇，之前的有种神性与冷漠的感觉，总之都很好看嘿嘿"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761738563,"group_id":"7542165189974576190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时来运亨，吉星长照₍ᐢ..ᐢ₎♡","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6c/sQey9YUIwFe2hd5Kj4c=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b127cd0ec30c469593ebd65384d7c82d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776532602&x-signature=pkZCsZG%2BdYHNfbTmYnWyvghQGdo%3D","user_id":"51997695041","user_name":"柧୧⍤⃝🌻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"51997695041","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7542165189974576190","book_info":{"abstract":"【实体出版已签约】
【女频无CP无限流+剧情流+微惊悚】
失业第一天，黎雾手机上莫名多了一个APP。
上面的工作简单且高薪，一看就是杀猪盘。
黎雾：“去！去的就是杀猪盘。”
她的工作任务很简单：
【小女孩保姆——5000元/天】
【整形医院护士——10000/天】
【农村守村人——30000/天】
工作内容透明，工资日结，杀猪盘她也认了。
……
入职保姆第一天，小女孩死了。
黎雾：“建议公司赔偿烧纸钱。”
入职护士俩小时，不小心被人爆了头。
黎雾：“希望保险管管这事。”
成为守村人的夜晚，村子烧起来了。
黎雾：“受工伤的话建议三倍赔偿。”
别人都在工作中抱头鼠窜尖叫哭嚎之际，黎雾早已默默成为了优秀员工，名字牢牢挂在榜一。
她的留言受全员工瞻仰：
“人钱九九。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9c075cb0372b3c051b8bff6b12c3f79e","author":"七一子","author_id":"","book_id":"7542165189974576190","book_name":"诡雾【无限流】","book_short_name":"诡雾降临","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"26.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542166216505295422","read_count":"263572","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"808540"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"384","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,幻想言情,无限流,灵异,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e9c168ebd6363efeb22d89f533aa523b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181702&x-signature=nzYrGE1CkM0S9B%2Fyfm%2FgpFqes44%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"66795247120","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"117"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170822DCE199F99564BAD73EAC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":112,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_durat on":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":12447,"reply_count":7,"show_pv":112652},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1759496539,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7563688636926296894","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，里面的每一个女性角色都有她自身独特的魅力，哪怕是反面角色也拥有自己独立的人格，独特的魅力，反正我是对里面和大部分的女性角色都讨厌不起来。
哪怕她坏，哪怕她歹毒，哪怕她心机算尽，我始终觉得她就该是这样的，她本来就是什么样子都可以的。
她有自己的野心，也有自己的坚持，有自己的原则，我感觉人物塑造挺立体的。
而且里面的亲情故事十分感人，非常值得品味。所描写事件也反映了部分现实，情节有趣不乏味，个人觉得是很好的一本书。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1761062774,"group_id":"7542165189974576190","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无性恋，但爱看百合和大女主。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7ZqWREuaHh9ShgFPJQ9qRIZcWV3NPB0gfC4kfORezt3","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b6ffb6e83f60483bba82d205fc678d14~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528398&x-signature=iQHztTXNyV17drJri7gw8gmaLCc%3D","user_id":"2035929417518958","user_name":"晏☆★"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2035929417518958","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7542165189974576190","book_info":{"abstract":"【实体出版已签约】
